title: Quant Pulse Research Intents Document
description: Published wrapper document for the research intents artifact emitted by Quant Pulse.

generatedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the published intents document was generated.

editionId.description: Quant Pulse edition identifier that produced the document.

sourceVersion.description: Version of the source pulse bundle used to generate the document.

sourceUpdatedAt.description: UTC timestamp of the source pulse bundle.

intentCount.description: Number of emitted intents in the document.

intents.description: Stable ordered list of emitted research intents.
